title: Class 3 Driver (Ambulance Van)
description:
Monday - Friday
8 AM - 5:30 PM
Location: Toa Payoh / Tampines

Benefits: Medical Insurance Coverage, Performance Bonus & Bi-Annual Bonus + OT (If Applicable)

Van cannot be driven home

  • Safely transport residents to and from the nursing home, hospitals, and external appointments using company vehicles.
  • Drive ambulance or patient transport vehicles in compliance with traffic regulations and safety protocols.
  • Assist wheelchair-bound and mobility-impaired residents during boarding and alighting, ensuring proper securing and handling.
  • Operate wheelchair lifts, ramps, and patient transport equipment safely and correctly.
  • Support residents with basic transfer needs where required, ensuring dignity and comfort at all times.
  • Ensure the safety of residents, staff, road users, and the general public during all journeys.
  • Maintain cleanliness and hygiene of the vehicle, including regular washing and interior sanitization as per schedule.
  • Drive safely under all road and weather conditions, adhering to nursing home and MOH guidelines.
  • Assist with ad-hoc duties related to resident transport and logistics when required.

Requirements

  • Possess a valid Class 3 driving license
  • Minimum 2 years of experience driving vans, ambulances, or patient transport vehicles.
  • Prior experience as an ambulance driver, or paramedic is highly preferred.
  • Familiarity with patient handling, wheelchair restraints, and basic medical transport protocols.
  • Physically fit and able to assist residents with mobility needs.
  • Good driving record with no serious traffic offences.
  • Calm, responsible, and able to remain composed when handling elderly or medically fragile residents.
  • Basic knowledge of first aid or patient care is an advantage.

Interested candidates please WhatsApp me at 8779 6100 or send in your resume to willie.goh@swiftsearchglobal.com

We regret to inform you that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

Willie Goh | EA Reg No: R2197853

Swift Search Global Pte Ltd | EA No: 18C9495
